title: Isolation of dsRNA from Plants by Cellulose Chromatography
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5nt7p","text":"This protocol describes the process The protocol for isolation of plant viruses based on dsRNA adapted from Luan et al., 2024 (see disclaimer or references for full citation).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"75trl","text":"This protocol is based on the previous description with some modifications [2, 6]. Compared to phenol/chloroform extraction of dsRNA, this method is free of phenol and chloroform and is highly efficient and rapid (less than 2 h to complete whole steps and only requires about 200 mg of fresh material). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cd4lj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cf2d1","text":"This protocol assumes that you have freeze-dried, milled plant tissue material ready.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"adm7t","text":"Please read SDS associated with various consumables and kits used in this protocol and wear appropriate PPE.  A site specific procedural risk assessment should be carried out prior to introducing this protocol to the lab. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Measure 50 mg of freeze dried milled plant sample
Transfer the tissue powder to a 2 mL centrifuge tube containing 600 µL NAE buffer and add pure ethanol to the final concentration of 30 % volume (~257 μL)
Thaw the tissue powder by vortexing immediately and then shake the mixture for at least 00:20:00 at room temperature on a horizontal shaker ( 1000 rpm, Room temperature, ). Avoid foam during vortex.
Centrifuge 10000 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes .
Equilibrate 40 mg cellulose in 600 µL 1×DSB buffer in a 1.5 mL centrifuge tube. Equilibration can increase the binding activity of cellulose.
Collect cellulose by centrifuge and discard the supernatant thoroughly.
Transfer the supernatant of step 5 to the centrifuge tube containing equilibrated cellulose from step 7.
Mix well by vortexing, shake the mixture for 00:30:00 at room temperature on a horizontal shaker ( 1000 rpm, Room temperature, ). The incubation time can be increased.
Centrifuge 5000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute to collect the cellulose.
Remove the supernatant and add 1 mL of 1×DSB buffer.
Mix well with a pipette and then shake gently on a horizontal shaker Undetermined, Room temperature, 5 minutes .
Repeat steps 10–12 twice. The washing steps can be increased until the supernatant becomes colorless to eliminate the contamination of cytochrome. We repeated the steps twice, as described above.
Remove the supernatant completely by pipetting.
Add 200 µL elution buffer to the dried pellet, vortex for 00:05:00 on a horizontal shaker ( 1000 rpm, Room temperature, 5 minutes ), and then centrifuge 5000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute .
Transfer the supernatant to a new 1.5 µL centrifuge tube kept on ice .
Repeat step 15 once.
Collect the supernatant to the same tube of step 16.
Centrifuge the tube containing dsRNA for 5000 x g, 4 °C, 1 minute and transfer the supernatant to a new 1.5 mL tube to eliminate any remaining cellulose.
Add 1/10 volume of 3 M sodium acetate ( pH 5.2 ) (ca. 40 µL ) and 8/10 volume of isopropanol (ca. 320 µL ) to the supernatant, mix well, and incubate overnight at -20 °C or 1h at -80 °C.
Centrifuge 14000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes to collect the dsRNA pellet.
Wash the dsRNA pellet with 70% ethanol twice by centrifugation ( 1000 rpm, °C, 1 minute ).
Discard the supernatant, air dry the pellet in a biosafe cabinet for 00:10:00 (extended to 00:20:00 ) and dissolve the dsRNA pellet in about 200 µL molecular biology graded water.
Prepare required buffers - list provided in materials
Additional step: centrifuge 5000 x g, Room temperature, 1 minute after removing majority of the supernatant, then remove the rest of it.
creator: Marta Niedzicka
